meta.title: Changsha Zhixike Technology Co., Ltd. | Software Product Development, AI Delivery & Digital Systems
meta.description: Changsha Zhixike Technology Co., Ltd. (XICO AI) delivers software products, AI applications, web and mobile systems, and digital platforms from requirement definition to stable launch.

hero.subtitle: XICO is a software technology company. We build our own products and help companies and founders move from requirement definition and interaction design to engineering, launch, and ongoing operations. The goal is straightforward: ship systems that can run, scale, and keep improving.
hero.stack: Software Product Development · AI Application Delivery · Web Platforms · Mobile Apps · Business Systems

capabilities.title: From requirements to launch, delivery has to be solid
capabilities.subtitle: We look beyond feature lists: product scope, user flows, technical architecture, data boundaries, and the maintenance cost after launch.

items.title: AI Application Delivery
items.desc: We integrate model capability into real workflows: knowledge bases, AI Q&A, content processing, retrieval, evaluation, permissions, and data boundaries.

items.title: Web and Mobile Products
items.desc: From customer-facing products to admin operations, we cover information architecture, interaction flows, design systems, full-stack engineering, and responsive delivery.

items.title: Business Systems and Platforms
items.desc: Orders, memberships, content, payments, data, and operation consoles designed around workflows, permissions, and management efficiency.

items.title: Long-term Technical Foundation
items.desc: Clear architecture, maintainable code, deployment, monitoring, security boundaries, and performance work that reduce rework after launch.

work.title: Our own products keep our delivery accountable
work.subtitle: Machi, Shangence, and our study-abroad and cross-border directions are long-term product lines under Changsha Zhixike Technology Co., Ltd. They test our methods in real business conditions.

items.name: Xico Clean
items.kind: macOS cleaner & optimizer · Flagship desktop app
items.tagline: Make your Mac fast and clean again
items.about: Xico Clean is Changsha Zhixike's flagship desktop app — a premium macOS cleaner and optimizer built to rival CleanMyMac X. Native Swift 6 + SwiftUI, deeply integrated with the system: one-tap Smart Scan, dedicated developer-junk cleanup, Space Lens visualization, duplicate and similar-photo detection, thorough uninstalls, privacy and maintenance. Every deletion is previewable and undoable, and everything runs locally — making cleanup both safe and beautiful.
items.desc: A native Swift-built Mac cleaner: Smart Scan, developer junk, space visualization, duplicate files and privacy cleanup — all local, previewable and undoable.

items.name: Machi
items.tagline: A service entry point for life abroad
items.desc: Local information, services, and community connection for students, new arrivals, and people learning a city.
items.about: Machi is built for people living abroad: students, new immigrants, and anyone still learning local rules and available resources. City information, community, housing, jobs, second-hand listings, local services, and lived experience are brought into one entry point so users can move faster from search to action.

items.name: Shangence
items.tagline: Decision support before opening a business
items.desc: Risk assessment, validation budget, and action planning for small founders.
items.about: Shangence helps founders make a more grounded decision before the first major spend. It reviews industry conditions, capital safety, personal capability, acquisition difficulty, and external constraints, then returns a risk score, validation budget, stop-loss line, and 30-day action plan. It does not promise success; it gives the decision better evidence.

items.name: Businesses in incubation
items.tagline: Extending product capability into defined industry scenarios
items.desc: We are developing product lines for study abroad, cross-border commerce, and local services across China, Japan, and overseas markets.
items.about: Study abroad, cross-border commerce, and local services are the next fields XICO will continue to explore. We bring software engineering, experience design, and operational tooling into specific industries so products can serve real transactions and long-term operations.

approach.title: Good software starts with clear scope and ownership
approach.subtitle: Product judgment, experience design, and engineering have to move together.

principles.title: Define the problem and boundaries
principles.desc: Requirements are not a feature list. They are tradeoffs across users, cost, timing, data, and business scope.

principles.title: Turn workflows into clear interfaces
principles.desc: Interfaces are not decoration. Hierarchy, feedback, permissions, and edge states determine operating efficiency.

principles.title: Write code that can be maintained
principles.desc: Clear structure, module boundaries, and data models make a project easier to iterate, hand over, and extend.

principles.title: Design for multiple markets early
principles.desc: Chinese, Japanese, English, compliance, payments, and user habits should enter the plan before launch.

cta.title: Before building a system, align the goal and the scope.
cta.subtitle: Bring us a new product, a legacy system, or a business preparing to launch. We will help define scope, priority, technical route, and delivery cadence.

footer.tagline: Software products, AI applications, and digital platforms. We make complex work clear, and useful systems last.

about.title: A software technology company built around product delivery.
about.subtitle: Changsha Zhixike Technology Co., Ltd. operates self-built products, software development, and AI application delivery under XICO AI｜智希可.
story: We started in Changsha and work toward China, Japan, and wider overseas markets. We build our own products, and we open our product design, software development, and launch operations capability to external projects.

We care about technology, but we care more about whether it enters a real workflow. A product works only when the requirement is clear, the interface is usable, the system is stable, and the team can maintain it after launch.

Our working method is direct: confirm the business goal and user flow, then define scope, technical route, and iteration cadence. Each stage should be explainable, reviewable, and ready for the next step.

items.title: Validate value before building
items.desc: Not every requirement belongs in the first version. Confirm the goal, users, cost, and validation method first.

items.title: Experience decides whether a system gets used
items.desc: Interfaces need to be clear, stable, and predictable so users know what to do next.

items.title: Engineering must support the next version
items.desc: After launch come maintenance, expansion, fixes, and growth. The codebase needs room for later versions.

founder.name: Yao Kai · 姚凱
founder.quote: A product is not a page. It is a system that can be used and maintained over time.
bio: I started XICO to put product judgment, experience design, and engineering execution into one delivery system. Many projects fail not because there is too little code, but because the problem, boundary, and priority were never made clear.

I tend to look at products from a full-stack point of view: front end, mobile, back end, database, payments, admin, deployment, and operations all have to connect. If one part is weak, users simply experience the system as unreliable.

Changsha Zhixike Technology Co., Ltd. will keep building its own products while opening its software development and product delivery capability to partners. We want to become a technology company that can deliver complex projects reliably.

company.focus: Software Products · AI Applications · Digital Platforms · Mobile and Web Development

services.subtitle: For new products from zero to one, existing-system rebuilds, AI capability integration, and teams that need a long-term technical partner.

process.title: From first conversation to stable launch
process.subtitle: The process is not complicated, but each step has to be clean.

steps.title: Diagnosis and tradeoffs
steps.desc: We clarify goals, users, budget, timing, and the core functions that must ship.

steps.title: Prototype and plan
steps.desc: We map workflows, screens, and the technical route so risks appear early.

steps.title: Build and integrate
steps.desc: Front end, back end, database, permissions, payments, and deployment move forward by version, with clear acceptance points.

steps.title: Launch and iterate
steps.desc: After launch, we read data and feedback, fix what needs fixing, and leave the product in a sustainable operating state.

faq.title: A few things to clarify before working together
faq.subtitle: If yours isn't here, just write and ask.

items.q: Are you more of a software development company or a product studio?
items.a: Both. XICO builds long-term products of its own, and also opens its product, design, development, and launch capability to external collaborations.

items.q: Can we talk if the idea is still rough?
items.a: Yes. Many projects start incomplete. We will first help judge whether the need is real, how small the first version should be, and which features can wait.

items.q: What kinds of projects do you usually take on?
items.a: Software products, AI applications, web and mobile products, admin systems, digital platforms, company websites, and brand experience.

items.q: How long does a project usually take?
items.a: It depends on scope. A usable first version usually takes weeks to a few months. We prefer to make the first version clear and solid, then iterate.

items.q: Do you support the product after launch?
items.a: Yes. Deployment, monitoring, fixes, feature iteration, content, and data maintenance can continue as the project needs.
Send an email or fill out the contact form. Tell us what you want to build, where the project stands, and the expected timing. We usually reply within 1-2 business days.

manifesto.title: Clear, reliable, maintainable.
body: We evaluate a project by more than whether the interface is finished. The workflow has to run, data has to be reliable, permissions have to be clear, and deployment and maintenance have to be sustainable.
Software is not a one-time deliverable. A valuable system can launch, be used, be fixed, and keep expanding into the next stage.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Changsha Zhixike Technology Co., Ltd. (“XICO AI”, “we”) respects and protects your privacy. This policy explains what information we collect on xicoai.com, how we use it, and the rights you have.

sections.p: When you contact us through a form, a partnership enquiry or a job application, we collect the information you choose to provide — such as your name, email, company, message, and the résumé file you upload when applying. We also collect basic technical logs (time of visit, pages, device type) to keep the site secure and stable.

We use this information only to respond to your enquiries, process collaboration or job applications, and operate and improve the site. We do not sell your personal information or use it for unrelated purposes.
Information is stored on servers under our control and protected with reasonable technical and organizational measures. We keep it only as long as needed for the purposes above.
We use only essential local storage to remember your theme (light/dark) and language preference. We do not use it for cross-site tracking.
You can contact us at hi@xicoai.com at any time to access, correct or delete your personal information.
We may update this policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on this page. Questions? Email hi@xicoai.com.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Welcome to xicoai.com. By accessing or using this site you agree to the following terms. This site is operated by Changsha Zhixike Technology Co., Ltd. (“XICO AI”).

sections.p: This site presents XICO AI's products, capabilities and company information, and provides ways to get in touch.

Unless otherwise stated, the text, design, marks and content of this site belong to XICO AI and may not be copied or used commercially without permission. Third-party brand marks belong to their respective owners.
Content on this site is provided “as is”. We aim to keep it accurate but make no warranty as to its completeness or timeliness.
To the extent permitted by law, XICO AI is not liable for any indirect or incidental loss arising from use of this site.
These terms are governed by the laws of the People's Republic of China.
For any questions about these terms, contact hi@xicoai.com.

meta.description: Xico Clean is a native Mac cleaner that frees up disk space fast: smart-scan junk, developer caches, and duplicate files. Buy once, try free for 14 days.

meta.buyTitle: Buy Xico Clean — Mac Cleaner, Buy Once, No Subscription

hero.eyebrow: Native macOS app · Built for Apple silicon
hero.subtitle: Xico Clean finds system junk, developer caches, large files, and duplicates in a single tap, then safely frees up disk space. Built in native Swift and fully local — preview before you delete, undo after.

items.title: Nothing leaves your Mac
items.desc: Every scan and analysis runs locally

items.title: Undoable deletion
items.desc: Basket first, then the Trash

items.title: 11 languages
items.desc: App and site, fully localized

items.title: Universal binary
items.desc: One installer for Apple silicon and Intel

features.title: One app to look after your entire Mac
features.subtitle: From system junk to developer caches, from space visualization to privacy cleanup — Xico Clean brings everything Mac maintenance needs into one polished native app.

items.name: Smart Scan
items.desc: Scan for system junk, privacy, and performance issues in one tap, with a clear overview and a safe one-click cleanup.

items.name: System Junk
items.desc: User and system caches, logs, language files, old update packages, and app caches — cleared with precision.

items.name: Developer Junk
items.desc: Xcode DerivedData, simulators, node_modules, Homebrew / npm / pip caches and dangling Docker images.

items.name: Space Lens
items.desc: Your whole disk as a sunburst map — drilling in morphs the sectors in one continuous bloom, with hues anchored so you never lose track.

items.name: Large & Old Files
items.desc: Filter by size and last-accessed date to quickly surface the big files worth clearing.

items.name: Duplicates
items.desc: Content-level deduplication that recognizes APFS clones to avoid false positives, and smartly keeps one copy.

items.name: Similar Photos
items.desc: On-device Vision clustering finds duplicate and near-identical photos, keeping the best shot.

items.name: Uninstaller
items.desc: Remove apps completely — along with their caches, preferences, containers, login items, and receipts.

items.name: Privacy Cleanup
items.desc: Clear history, cookies, and caches across Safari, Chrome, Firefox, Edge, and Arc.

items.name: Optimize & Maintain
items.desc: Manage login items, free up memory, run maintenance scripts, rebuild the index, and flush DNS.

items.name: Menu Bar Monitor
items.desc: Several mini gauges side by side in a single menu-bar item — CPU histogram, memory pie, network up/down rates, and battery — each configurable on its own.

items.name: Malware Removal
items.desc: Scan for known macOS adware and malicious components using a signed definitions library, and remove them on detection.

items.name: Collection Basket
items.desc: Deletion in two stages: collect and preview first, take items back out anytime; a 5-second undo window before it runs, and files go to the Trash.

items.name: Explainable Health Score
items.desc: Five sub-scores — free disk space, memory pressure, temperature, thermal pressure, and SMART — each traceable to real readings and a published formula.

items.name: Free Up iCloud Copies
items.desc: Remove the local caches of already-downloaded files. Everything stays intact in iCloud, ready to re-download anytime.

items.name: Threshold Alerts
items.desc: Notifies only when CPU, memory, disk, temperature, or battery stays over its limit for a duration you set — with a cooldown against false alarms.

deepdive.title: Turning tedious cleanup into something that feels good
deepdive.subtitle: A few capabilities you'll remember at a glance — the ones we poured the most care into polishing.

items.title: One tap, and your whole Mac feels new
items.desc: System junk, privacy traces, and performance issues, cleared in a single pass. After the signature scan animation, you get a clear overview card — how much you can reclaim and what we found. Only 100% safe items are checked by default, and you can review every one.
points: Combined scan: system junk, privacy, and performance
Only 100% safe items checked by default
A reclaimable-space overview when it's done

items.title: See your disk — and where the space went, at a glance
items.desc: Your disk drawn as a sunburst. Drilling in morphs the sectors in one continuous bloom, small items gather into an 'Other' arc, and hues stay anchored between levels — you always know where you are. Reveal any folder in Finder or move it to the Trash right there.
points: Small items gather into an 'Other' arc · hues stay anchored
Reveal in Finder or move to Trash

items.title: Reclaim tens of gigabytes — made for developers
items.desc: Xcode's DerivedData, DeviceSupport, Archives, and old simulators, plus node_modules, Homebrew / npm / pip caches, and dangling Docker images — the developer junk that quietly eats tens of gigabytes, all found in one pass.
points: Dangling Docker images and old simulators

items.title: Duplicate files and near-identical photos — keep only the best
items.desc: Content-level hashing finds duplicates precisely and recognizes APFS clones to avoid false positives, while similar-photo detection uses on-device Vision clustering to help you keep the best shot from a burst. Always local, never uploaded.

safety.title: The biggest fear in cleaning is deleting the wrong thing — so we build peace of mind into every step
safety.subtitle: The biggest trust risk in any cleaner is accidental deletion. So from preview to undo, from whitelist to protection list, every deletion in Xico Clean leaves a way back.

items.title: Always preview, then delete
items.desc: Items head to the Collection Basket first — expand to see path and size, take anything back out, and nothing runs until you confirm.

items.title: Undoable
items.desc: A 5-second, non-blocking countdown runs before every cleanup — cancel anytime. Deletions go to the Trash first, so you can still recover.

items.title: Whitelist & ignore list
items.desc: Permanently protect certain paths, and Xico Clean will never touch them again.

items.title: Built-in protection list
items.desc: Critical system files, SIP-protected paths, and the keychain are strictly off-limits — dangerous items are auto-rejected and never enter the basket.

items.title: Safe items only, by default
items.desc: Risky items — like language files or active app caches — are unchecked by default and clearly flagged.

items.title: Transparent by design
items.desc: Every category explains what it is and what happens if you delete it — and the deletion red lines are published on the app's Safety Promise page.

privacy.title: Your files stay on your Mac — always
privacy.subtitle: Cleaning is deeply personal. All scanning and analysis in Xico Clean happen locally — we neither want to, nor are able to, see your files.
points: All scanning and analysis run locally
No file contents are ever uploaded
Telemetry is anonymous and can be turned off in one tap
Similar-photo detection is pure on-device Vision

performance.title: Built in native Swift — so fast you'll barely notice it
performance.subtitle: We flatly refuse to use Electron. Xico Clean is thoroughly native and built for Apple silicon — fast to scan, light on resources, smooth in motion.

items.label: smooth even with huge numbers of files
menu bar drawn in pure CoreGraphics — easy on the battery

pricing.title: Pay once. No subscription traps
pricing.subtitle: Instead of renewing every year, pay once. Xico Clean is a one-time purchase with free updates for the long haul — and a 14-day full-feature trial to help you decide.
pricing.priceNote: See current pricing and offers on the purchase page. Try free for 14 days first.
features: Buy once, free updates for the long haul
Use it on all your own Macs

waitlist.title: Get Xico Clean updates
waitlist.subtitle: Leave your email and we'll tell you about new versions and important updates.

fields.name: Your name (optional)
fields.success: Subscribed! We'll tell you as soon as there's a new version.
fields.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

waitlist.privacyNote: Used only for product-update notices. No spam, ever.

items.a: macOS 14 Sonoma and later, as a universal binary for both Apple silicon and Intel — one installer for all.

items.q: Is it safe? Could it delete the wrong thing?
items.a: Everything you remove goes to the Collection Basket first, where you can preview items and take them back out. A 5-second countdown runs before every cleanup, deletions go to the Trash so they stay recoverable, and a built-in protection list auto-rejects anything dangerous.
No. All scanning and analysis happen locally, no file contents are ever uploaded, and telemetry can be turned off in one tap.
No. Xico Clean is a one-time purchase with free updates for the long haul, plus a 14-day full-feature trial.

items.q: Will it be on the App Store?
items.a: It ships directly as a signed Developer ID build, so its features aren't limited by the sandbox — and it's just as safe to install.
Yes — download Xico Clean 0.3.0 today and try every feature free for 14 days, no signup required.

items.q: How is Xico Clean different from CleanMyMac?
items.a: Xico Clean is a native Swift app you buy once — a single payment, free updates for the long haul, and no subscription. Beyond deep cleaning and complete uninstalls, it adds a live menu-bar monitor, hardware and battery health, a real 10 GB disk speed benchmark, and Space Lens disk visualization — folding what used to take several separate apps into one. Everything runs locally, and your files are never uploaded.

items.q: How do I clean my Mac and free up disk space?
items.a: Open Xico Clean and tap Smart Scan — within seconds it surfaces system junk, developer caches, large files, and duplicates. Then open Space Lens to see your whole disk as an interactive map and pinpoint the folders eating the most room. A safe cleanup can reclaim anywhere from a few to dozens of gigabytes.

items.q: Is there a free Mac cleaner?
items.a: Xico Clean includes a 14-day full-feature free trial — no signup needed to download and put the complete cleanup and optimization toolkit to work. After the trial, a single one-time purchase keeps it yours for good. It's not a subscription.

footer.tagline: Xico Clean — a native cleaner and optimizer for Mac. Native, safe, and fully local.

catalog.title: One app for every corner of Mac maintenance
catalog.subtitle: From cleanup to app management, from files and space to performance and security — Xico Clean brings everything your Mac needs into one native app.

items.name: Smart Scan
items.desc: Scan for system junk, privacy, and performance issues in one pass, with a clear overview and a safe one-click cleanup.

items.name: System Junk
items.desc: User and system caches, logs, language files, broken login items and preferences, old updates, and app caches.

items.name: Mail Attachments
items.desc: Clear locally cached mail attachments and downloads — instant inbox slimming.

items.name: Photo Junk
items.desc: Clear your photo library's caches and unoptimized copies, leaving your originals untouched.

items.name: iOS Backups
items.desc: Remove old iOS backups, firmware and device-support files you no longer need.

items.name: Trash
items.desc: Empty the Trash across every volume in one go.

items.name: Developer Junk
items.desc: Xcode DerivedData, simulators, node_modules, Homebrew / npm / pip caches and dangling Docker images.

items.name: Collection Basket
items.desc: Two-stage deletion: collect and preview first, remove items anytime; a 5-second undo window, and files go to the Trash.

items.name: Uninstaller
items.desc: Remove apps completely — along with their caches, preferences, containers, login items, and receipts.

items.name: Leftovers
items.desc: Find orphaned files left behind by apps you've already deleted.

items.name: Updater
items.desc: Spot available updates for your installed apps, all in one place.

items.name: Reset
items.desc: Return an app to its just-installed state: wipe its data, keep the app.

items.name: Space Lens
items.desc: A drill-down sunburst with a continuous bloom animation between levels — pinpoint exactly what's taking up room.

items.name: Large & Old Files
items.desc: Filter by size and last-accessed date to surface the big items worth clearing.

items.name: Duplicate Finder
items.desc: Content-level deduplication that recognizes APFS clones to avoid false positives, and smartly keeps one copy.

items.name: Similar Photos
items.desc: On-device Vision clustering keeps the best shot from your bursts and near-identical photos.

items.name: Downloads & Clutter
items.desc: Tidy up your Downloads folder, desktop clutter, and old installers (.dmg / .pkg).

items.name: Free Up iCloud Copies
items.desc: Remove local caches of downloaded files; everything stays in iCloud, ready to re-download.

items.name: Optimization
items.desc: Manage login items and launch agents, spot heavy background processes, and free up memory.

items.name: Maintenance
items.desc: Run system maintenance scripts, rebuild the Spotlight index, flush DNS and repair disk permissions.

items.name: Privacy
items.desc: Clear history, cookies, caches, and recent items across Safari, Chrome, Firefox, Edge, and Arc.

items.name: Malware Removal
items.desc: Scan for known macOS adware and malicious components using a signed definitions library, and remove them on detection.

items.name: Menu Bar Monitor
items.desc: Several mini gauges in a single menu-bar item, one-click presets, and per-gauge refresh rate and colors.

items.name: Explainable Health Score
items.desc: Five sub-scores — disk space, memory pressure, temperature, thermal pressure, and SMART — each traceable to real readings and a published formula.

items.name: Threshold Alerts
items.desc: Notifies only when a limit stays exceeded for a duration you set, with a cooldown against false alarms.

download.title: Give your Mac a fresh start
download.subtitle: Free download, 14-day full trial. Native Apple silicon, signed developer build — ready the moment you open it.
download.trust: Signed developer build — drag it into Applications and your 14-day trial starts right away.

lens.title: Your whole disk, at a glance
lens.desc: Disk usage drawn as a drill-down sunburst: hue is the top-level folder, angle is size. Drilling in morphs the sectors in one continuous bloom, small items gather into an 'Other' arc, and hues stay anchored between levels — you always know where you are and where the space went. Read-only analysis, all the way.

cards.title: Bloom drill-down
cards.desc: Click a sector and the chart morphs continuously between levels — no hard cuts.

cards.title: The 'Other' arc
cards.desc: Tiny items gather into one arc, keeping the picture clean and readable.

cards.title: Anchored hues
cards.desc: Each top-level folder keeps its hue at every depth, so you never get lost.

cards.title: Two-step deletion
cards.desc: Collect to the basket first, preview freely — and undo within 5 seconds of running.

lens.caption: Space Lens · sunburst chart
lens.captionDrilled: Drilled in · family hues carry over

speed.title: A real 10 GB read/write benchmark
speed.desc: Twin gauges swing in real time. Writes up to 10 GB of fully random data, bypassing system and firmware caches — measuring sustained real performance, not cache mirages. Every run is archived automatically.
speed.caption: Disk Speed Test · sequential benchmark

allinone.title: Four pro tools' capabilities. One purchase.
allinone.desc: Deep cleaning, live monitoring, hardware health, disk tools — capabilities that used to take four separately-paid apps, all covered by one Xico Clean.
allinone.footNote: Each sold separately, some by subscription; Xico Clean covers it all with one purchase.

showcase.title: A full toolkit, one tap each
showcase.lede: Junk cleanup, complete uninstall, duplicate finder, optimization — each one refined, all in one app.
